lang.zh-CN: 隧道列表 - 客户端 ID:
允许客户端通过配置文件连接
lang.en-US: Allow client connect by config file

lang.zh-CN: 服务端端口(留空自动生成)
唯一值，不填将自动生成
lang.en-US: Unique, non-filling will be generated automatically

lang.zh-CN: 随便填，自动识别（支持时间戳、注意系统时区），留空关闭。例如：2025-01-01（指定东八时区：2025-01-01 00:00:00 +0800 CST）
lang.en-US: Fill freely, automatically recognized. Leave empty to disable. For example: 2025-01-01 or 2025-01-01 00:00:00 +0800 CST

lang.zh-CN: 通提供一个公网可访问的本地文件服务，此模式仅客户端使用配置文件模式方可启动。
lang.en-US: Provide a local file service accessible to the public network, which can only be started by the client using the profile mode.

lang.zh-CN: 将公网服务器1.1.1.1的8004端口作为HTTP代理，访问内网网站。
lang.en-US: Use port 8004 of public server 1.1.1.1 as HTTP proxy to visit intranet site.

lang.zh-CN: 流量不经过公网服务器，受nat类型影响较大，不能保证100%成功，支持大部分nat类型。
lang.en-US: The traffic does not pass through the public network server, which is greatly affected by the NAT type, and cannot guarantee 100% success. Most NAT types are supported. A client is also required to provide a port for access to the access side.

lang.zh-CN: 无需新增端口,实现访问内网服务器10.1.50.2的22端口,可防止其他人连接。还需要一个客户端作为访问端提供一个端口进行访问。
lang.en-US: There is no need to add a new port to access port 22 of intranet server 10.1.50.2, which can prevent other people from connecting. A client is also required to provide a port for access to the access side.

lang.zh-CN: 将公网服务器1.1.1.1的8003端口作为SOCKS5代理，访问内网任意设备或者资源。
lang.en-US: Use port 8003 of public server 1.1.1.1 as Socks5 proxy to access any device or resource in the Intranet.

lang.zh-CN: 将公网服务器1.1.1.1的8003端口作为HTTP/SOCKS5代理，访问内网任意设备或者资源。
lang.en-US: Use port 8003 of public server 1.1.1.1 as HTTP/Socks5 proxy to access any device or resource in the Intranet.

lang.zh-CN: 通过公网服务器1.1.1.1的8001端口，连接内网机器10.1.50.101的22端口，实现SSH连接。
lang.en-US: Connect port 8001 of public server 1.1.1.1 to port 22 of Intranet machine 10.1.50.101 to realize SSH connection.

lang.zh-CN: 通过公网服务器1.1.1.1的53端口，访问内网机器10.1.50.101的53端口，使用DNS服务。
lang.en-US: Through port 53 of public server 1.1.1.1, access port 53 of Intranet machine 10.1.50.101, and use DNS service.
Create account to see it in action.

lang.zh-CN: 冒号分割，多个头部请填写多行
lang.en-US: Colon separated, multiple lines please fill in

lang.zh-CN: 启用黑/白名单后，SOCKS5 不支持 UDP（将禁用 UDP Associate）。
lang.en-US: When whitelist/blacklist is enabled, SOCKS5 does not support UDP (UDP Associate will be disabled).

lang.zh-CN: 入口访问控制用于限制访问来源；关闭时不做来源限制。
lang.en-US: Entry ACL limits who can access this resource. Disable it to allow all sources.

lang.zh-CN: 每行一个：IP、CIDR、域名或通配符域名（如 *.example.com）。
lang.en-US: One per line: IP, CIDR, hostname, or wildcard domain (e.g. *.example.com).

lang.zh-CN: 每行一个：IP、CIDR、geoip:国家代码、IPv4 前缀通配（如 10.*），支持 # 注释。
lang.en-US: One per line: IP, CIDR, geoip:country-code, IPv4 prefix wildcard (for example 10.*). Lines starting with # are comments.

lang.zh-CN: 按域名（SNI）分流；不在此解密 TLS，数据原样转给后端。提示：后端启用 HTTP/2 时，浏览器可能复用连接，导致偶发串站。
lang.en-US: Route by domain (SNI). No TLS decryption here; traffic is forwarded unchanged to the backend. Note: with HTTP/2 backends, browsers may reuse a connection and cause misrouting.

lang.zh-CN: 按域名（SNI）分流；仅处理 TLS 握手，将解密后的数据转发给后端。
lang.en-US: Route by domain (SNI); handle only the TLS handshake, then forward the decrypted data to the backend.

lang.zh-CN: P2P连接和私密代理模式需要
协议支持全面，兼容几乎所有常用协议，例如tcp、udp、http(s)、socks5、p2p、http代理...
lang.en-US: Comprehensive protocol support, compatible with almost all commonly used protocols, such as tcp, udp, http(s), socks5, p2p, http proxy ...

lang.zh-CN: 全平台兼容(linux、windows、macos、群辉等)，支持一键安装为系统服务
lang.en-US: Full platform compatibility (linux, windows, macos, Qunhui, etc.), support installation as a system service simply.

lang.zh-CN: 控制全面，同时支持服务端和客户端控制
lang.en-US: Comprehensive control, both client and server control are allowed.

lang.zh-CN: https集成，支持将后端代理和web服务转成https，同时支持多证书
lang.en-US: Https integration, support to convert backend proxy and web services to https, and support multiple certificates.

lang.zh-CN: 操作简单，只需简单的配置即可在web ui上完成其余操作
lang.en-US: Just simple configuration on web ui can complete most requirements.

lang.zh-CN: 展示信息全面，流量、系统信息、即时带宽、客户端版本等
lang.en-US: Complete information display, such as traffic, system information, real-time bandwidth, client version, etc.

lang.zh-CN: 扩展功能强大，该有的都有了（缓存、压缩、加密、流量限制、带宽限制、端口复用等等）
lang.en-US: Powerful extension functions, everything is available (cache, compression, encryption, traffic limit, bandwidth limit, port reuse, etc.)

lang.zh-CN: 域名转发具备自定义header、404页面配置、host修改、站点保护、URL路由、泛域名转发等功能
lang.en-US: Domain name resolution has functions such as custom headers, 404 page configuration, host modification, site protection, URL routing, and pan-resolution.

lang.zh-CN: 服务端支持多用户和用户注册功能
lang.en-US: Multi-user and user registration support on server.

lang.zh-CN: 选中时清空当前流量统计信息
lang.en-US: Clear current traffic statistics when selected

lang.zh-CN: 统一查看节点客户端的归属、生命周期和委派管理信息。批量操作与节点管理 API 保持一致，并遵循与单项操作相同的权限范围。
lang.en-US: Track node clients with unified ownership, lifecycle, and delegated-management metadata. Batch actions stay aligned with the node management API and respect the same permission scope as single-item actions.

lang.zh-CN: 使用与其他管理表格一致的批量流程查看被封禁的用户名和 IP。可按选择项精确解封，也可在紧急情况下执行全量清理。
lang.en-US: Review blocked usernames and IPs with the same bulk workflow used by other management tables. Use selected unban for targeted cleanup, or keep the full clear action for emergency resets.

lang.zh-CN: 使用与管理界面其他部分一致的批量选择和规范节点管理路由来查看和操作隧道。
lang.en-US: Browse and operate tunnels with the same batch selection and canonical node-manage routing used by the rest of the management UI.

lang.zh-CN: 使用与隧道和客户端一致的批量选择和归属感知流程管理域名转发规则。
lang.en-US: Manage host forwarding rules with the same selection, batch, and ownership-aware workflow used by tunnels and clients.

lang.zh-CN: 创建隧道时沿用节点管理页统一的归属、配额和生命周期规则。先选择客户端，再配置下方与模式相关的字段。
lang.en-US: Create a tunnel with the same ownership, quota, and lifecycle rules used across the node management pages. Select a client first, then tune mode-specific fields below.

lang.zh-CN: 使用与其他页面一致的表单交互编辑隧道路由、配额和协议选项。切换模式时仅保留对应模式相关字段。
lang.en-US: Edit tunnel routing, quota, and protocol options with the same form behavior used elsewhere. Changing the mode keeps only the fields relevant to that tunnel type visible.

lang.zh-CN: 创建域名规则时沿用节点统一的归属和生命周期模型。TLS 相关选项会随所选协议保持分组和联动。
lang.en-US: Create a host rule with the same ownership and lifecycle model used by the rest of the node. TLS-related options stay grouped and change consistently with the selected scheme.

lang.zh-CN: 使用与新增域名相同的分组控件编辑域名路由、TLS 行为和响应改写。只读会话仍可查看完整的生效配置。
lang.en-US: Edit host routing, TLS behavior, and response rewriting with the same grouped controls used in host creation. Read-only sessions still see the full effective configuration.

lang.zh-CN: 你当前仅有该隧道的查看权限，可编辑字段已锁定，且不能执行更新或克隆。
lang.en-US: You have view-only access to this tunnel. Editable fields are locked because the current actor cannot update or clone it.

lang.zh-CN: 你当前仅有该域名规则的查看权限，可编辑字段已锁定，且不能执行更新或克隆。
lang.en-US: You have view-only access to this host rule. Editable fields are locked because the current actor cannot update or clone it.

lang.zh-CN: 使用与其他资源列表一致的批量管理方式维护节点本地用户。这些用户独立于管理平台账户，是节点内归属、配额和生命周期控制的真实来源。
lang.en-US: Manage node-local users with the same batch-friendly workflow used by other resource lists. These users stay independent from management-platform accounts and remain the authority for local ownership, quotas, and lifecycle enforcement.

lang.zh-CN: 节点本地用户与管理平台用户彼此独立。隐藏的平台服务账户不会显示在此列表中，由节点自动维护。
lang.en-US: Local node users are independent from management-platform users. Hidden platform service accounts are excluded from this list and are managed automatically by the node.

lang.zh-CN: 删除这 {count} 个用户，并级联删除其下所有客户端、隧道和域名？
lang.en-US: Delete these {count} users and cascade-delete all of their clients, tunnels, and hosts?

lang.zh-CN: 删除该用户，并级联删除其下所有客户端、隧道和域名？
lang.en-US: Delete this user and cascade-delete all of its clients, tunnels, and hosts?

lang.zh-CN: 创建节点本地用户账号，用于在当前节点上独立归属多个客户端。这里的用户配额决定本地生命周期与计费边界。
lang.en-US: Create a node-local user account that can independently own multiple clients on this node. User quotas here define local lifecycle and billing boundaries.

lang.zh-CN: 调整承载客户端归属、本地配额和生命周期控制的节点本地用户。修改会统一作用到当前节点上该用户归属的所有客户端。
lang.en-US: Adjust the node-local user profile that anchors client ownership, local quotas, and lifecycle enforcement. Changes apply consistently across all clients owned by this user on the current node.
Leave empty to keep current password

lang.zh-CN: 这是一个节点本地用户账号。它可以归属当前节点上的多个客户端，并在没有外部管理平台时独立运行。
lang.en-US: This is a node-local user account. It can own multiple clients on this node and run independently of any external management platform.

lang.zh-CN: 可选，输入 Base32 TOTP 密钥
lang.en-US: Optional. Enter a Base32 TOTP secret

lang.zh-CN: 留空则保持当前 TOTP 密钥
lang.en-US: Leave empty to keep current TOTP secret

lang.zh-CN: 可选。配置后账号可启用 TOTP；如果已配置 TOTP，则密码可以为空。
lang.en-US: Optional. When configured, the account can use TOTP; once TOTP is enabled, the password may be empty.

lang.zh-CN: 勾选后会显式清空当前密码。
lang.en-US: When checked, the current password will be cleared explicitly.

lang.zh-CN: 勾选后会显式清空当前 TOTP 密钥。
lang.en-US: When checked, the current TOTP secret will be cleared explicitly.

lang.zh-CN: 禁用后用户将无法登录，其归属客户端也会被生命周期巡检器踢下线。
lang.en-US: Disabled users are blocked from login and their bound clients will be kicked by the lifecycle monitor.

lang.zh-CN: 状态变更会通过生命周期巡检器同步作用到该用户归属的所有客户端。
lang.en-US: Changing status takes effect on all bound clients through the lifecycle monitor.

lang.zh-CN: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS 或 Unix 时间戳
仅清空该用户持久化的计费总流量，客户端运行时流量计数会继续独立累计。
lang.en-US: This clears the persisted billing total for the user only. Client runtime traffic counters continue independently.

lang.zh-CN: 你当前仅有该用户的查看权限，表单字段已锁定。
lang.en-US: You have view-only access to this user profile. Editable fields are locked because the current actor cannot update it.

lang.zh-CN: 创建节点客户端，并统一配置归属、生命周期与连接控制。本地用户可以归属多个客户端，未分配归属的客户端则保持为平台直管。
lang.en-US: Create a node client with consistent ownership, lifecycle, and connection controls. Local users can own multiple clients, while unassigned clients remain platform-managed.

lang.zh-CN: 在同一表单中更新客户端接入、归属和本地运行控制。归属用户承担生命周期与计费，委派管理用户仅拥有操作权限。
lang.en-US: Update client access, ownership, and local runtime controls from a single form. Owner users carry lifecycle and billing, while delegated managers only receive operation rights.

lang.zh-CN: 仅对平台直管客户端生效。已归属用户的客户端会继承其归属用户的生命周期限制。
lang.en-US: Only applies to platform-managed clients. Bound clients inherit lifecycle from their owner user.

lang.zh-CN: 留空表示永久有效。已归属用户的客户端会继承其归属用户的生命周期限制。
lang.en-US: Leave empty for permanent access. Bound clients inherit lifecycle from their owner user.

lang.zh-CN: 选择归属用户后，客户端会继承其生命周期、计费和权限控制。留空则保持为平台直管客户端。
lang.en-US: Select a managed user to inherit lifecycle, billing, and permissions. Leave empty to keep this client platform-managed.

lang.zh-CN: 选择归属用户后，客户端的生命周期、计费和登录控制都会迁移到该用户；清空则恢复为平台直管。
lang.en-US: Selecting a managed user moves lifecycle, billing, and login to that user. Clearing the selection turns this client back into a platform-managed client.

lang.zh-CN: 每行一个用户 ID，或使用逗号分隔
lang.en-US: One user ID per line or comma-separated

lang.zh-CN: 可选的节点本地委派管理用户。这些用户可以管理客户端，但不会成为计费归属方。
lang.en-US: Optional node-local delegated managers. These users can operate the client without becoming the billing owner.

lang.zh-CN: 该客户端的登录与生命周期控制由归属用户继承。
lang.en-US: This client inherits login and lifecycle controls from its owner user.

lang.zh-CN: 你当前仅有该客户端的查看权限，可编辑字段已锁定。
lang.en-US: You have view-only access to this client. Editable fields are locked because the current actor cannot update it.

lang.zh-CN: 编辑节点级默认配置，并查看当前节点如何向管理平台暴露自身能力。即使有外部平台接入，这些配置仍以节点本地状态为准。
lang.en-US: Edit node-level defaults and review how this node exposes itself to management platforms. These values remain local truth even when external platforms connect through the node API.

lang.zh-CN: 查看已配置的管理平台、节点声明的能力，以及它们应使用的节点 API 端点。所有平台都应以节点返回状态为准。
lang.en-US: Inspect configured management platforms, advertised capabilities, and the node API endpoints they should use. Node responses remain the authoritative state for all connected platforms.

lang.zh-CN: 该节点始终保存自己的本地真源数据。外部管理平台通过节点 API 接入，并应以节点返回结果作为最终状态。
lang.en-US: This node keeps its own local truth. External management platforms connect through the node API and should treat node responses as authoritative state.

lang.zh-CN: 当前未配置任何管理平台，节点正以本地独立模式运行。
lang.en-US: No management platform is configured. This node is currently operating in standalone-local mode.

lang.zh-CN: 确认解除这 {count} 条选中封禁记录吗？
查看管理平台回调失败队列，必要时手动重放或清空。节点本地队列仅用于补偿 webhook 失败，不替代节点真实状态。
lang.en-US: Inspect failed management platform callback deliveries and replay or clear them when needed. This local node queue only compensates webhook delivery failures and does not replace node source-of-truth state.

lang.zh-CN: 当前没有待补偿的回调事件。
当前没有在线运行时实例。
当前没有启用回调的管理平台，因此没有可管理的回调队列。
lang.en-US: No callback-enabled management platform is configured, so there is no callback queue to manage.

lang.zh-CN: 确认立即重放该平台的回调失败队列吗？
lang.en-US: Replay queued callback events for this platform now?

lang.zh-CN: 确认清空该平台的回调失败队列吗？
lang.en-US: Clear queued callback events for this platform?
Only socks5 , web, HTTP forward proxy

lang.zh-CN: 例如 用户1=密码1 用户2=密码2
一款轻量级、高性能、功能强大的内网穿透代理服务器
lang.en-US: A lightweight, high-performance, powerful intranet reverse proxy server

lang.zh-CN: 分行填写多个目标可实现负载均衡
代理到本地可以只填写端口号，只有TCP模式支持负载均衡
lang.en-US: Can only fill in ports if it is local machine proxy, only tcp supports load balancing
Leave the password authentication blank to disable it

lang.zh-CN: 支持填写证书路径或证书文本内容（支持拖拽填写），证书文件格式为：xxxx.pem
lang.en-US: Supports entering the certificate path or certificate text content (drag-and-drop supported). The certificate file format should be: xxxx.pem

lang.zh-CN: 支持填写私钥路径或私钥文本内容（支持拖拽填写），证书秘钥格式为：xxxx.key
lang.en-US: Supports entering the private key path or private key text content (drag-and-drop supported). The private key file format should be: xxxx.key
Path rewrite prefix (leave blank to disable)

lang.zh-CN: 全局来源访问控制。按 global > user > client > tunnel/host 顺序叠加，支持白名单和黑名单。
lang.en-US: Global source access control. It composes in global > user > client > tunnel/host order and supports whitelist or blacklist.

lang.zh-CN: 一行一个规则，支持精确 IP、CIDR、IPv4 前缀通配符和 geoip:xx。关闭时留空即可。
lang.en-US: One rule per line. Supports exact IPs, CIDR, IPv4 prefix wildcards, and geoip:xx. Leave empty when disabled.

lang.zh-CN: 你确定要执行该操作吗？
lang.en-US: Are you sure you want to continue?
Select at least one item first

lang.zh-CN: {label}完成，成功 {success} 项，失败 {failed} 项
检测到可复用证书：当前域名可直接复用规则 {source_label} 的证书。留空会自动复用，也可以直接带入当前表单。
lang.en-US: Reusable certificate detected: this host can reuse the certificate from rule {source_label}. Leaving the cert fields empty will reuse it automatically, or you can apply the file-path certificate to this form.

lang.zh-CN: 检测到可复用证书：当前域名可直接复用规则 {source_label} 的证书。留空会自动复用，文本证书不再建议复制到当前表单。
lang.en-US: Reusable certificate detected: this host can reuse the certificate from rule {source_label}. Leaving the cert fields empty will reuse it automatically; text certificates are no longer copied into this form.

lang.zh-CN: 当前表单配置了手动证书时生效，不区分文本或路径。保存时会忽略转发路径，只按域名是否被该证书覆盖，把其他可编辑 Host 记录同步到这份证书；若目标 Host 当前仍开启自动证书，会保留开启状态，后续是否切回手动证书由用户决定。
lang.en-US: Applies when the form has a manual certificate, whether PEM text or file path. Saving ignores route paths and records this certificate on other editable hosts when their domains are covered. Hosts that still have Auto SSL enabled keep it enabled; switching back to manual TLS remains a user decision.
PoW calculation timed out. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to toggle it?
Are you sure you want to clear it?
Are you sure you want to delete it?
Are you sure you want to start it?
Are you sure you want to stop it?

lang.zh-CN: 你确定要解除该封禁吗？
lang.en-US: Are you sure you want to unban this record?

lang.zh-CN: 你确定要清除所有封禁记录吗？
lang.en-US: Are you sure you want to clear all ban records?

lang.zh-CN: 添加错误，找不到客户端
lang.en-US: Add error, the client can not be found

lang.zh-CN: 修改出错，客户端不存在
lang.en-US: Modified error, the client is not exist
The number of tunnels exceeds the limit

lang.zh-CN: 无法打开端口，因为它可能已被占用或不再被允许。
lang.en-US: The port cannot be opened because it may has been occupied or is no longer allowed.

lang.zh-CN: 无法打开端口，因为它可能已被占用或不再被允许。
lang.en-US: The port cannot be opened because it may has been occupied or is no longer allowed.

lang.zh-CN: 唯一验证密钥重复，请重新设置
lang.en-US: Unique verify key duplicate, please reset

lang.zh-CN: Web登陆用户名重复，请重新设置
lang.en-US: Web login username duplicate, please reset

lang.zh-CN: 验证码错误，请重新获取并重试
lang.en-US: The verification code is wrong, please get it again and try again
